old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-ix7m","title":"Entire log file loaded into memory risks exhaustion on large tests","description":"## Location
scripts/analyze-hetero-fleet.py:53

## Description
The script uses `log_file.read_text()` which loads the entire file into memory. For long-running mesh tests with thousands of nodes and millions of packets, individual log files can be gigabytes. This will exhaust memory and crash the analysis before producing results.

## Failure Scenario
A 48-hour soak test produces py-1000.log at 2GB. When parse_python_logs() calls read_text(), Python allocates 2GB for the string, plus overhead for splitlines() creating another copy as a list. On a 4GB machine, the script crashes with MemoryError before generating any report.

## Category
